---
title: "Luis M. Montilla"
image: profile.png
about:
  template: trestles
  links:
    - text: "{{< iconify simple-icons orcid >}} ORCID"
      href: https://orcid.org/0000-0002-7079-6775
    - text: "{{< iconify logos bluesky >}} BlueSky"
      href: https://bsky.app/profile/luismmontilla.bsky.social
    - text: "{{< iconify logos mastodon-icon >}} Mastodon"
      href: https://fediscience.org/@luismmontilla
      rel: "me"
    - text: "{{< iconify devicon linkedin >}} LinkedIn"
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/luismmontilla/
    - text: "{{< iconify bi github >}} Github"
      href: https://github.com/luismmontilla
    - text: "{{< iconify bi gitlab >}} Gitlab"
      href: https://gitlab.com/luismontilla
    - text: "{{< iconify material-symbols person >}} OpenAlex"
      href: https://openalex.org/authors/a5027349295   
    - text: "{{< iconify academicons google-scholar >}} Google Scholar"
      href: https://scholar.google.com/citations?hl=en&user=vwVkZfwAAAAJ&view_op=list_works&sortby=pubdate
    - text: "{{< iconify fa-regular newspaper >}} Scholia"
      href: https://scholia.toolforge.org/author/Q57276976  
    - text: Semble
      href: https://semble.so/profile/luismmontilla.com
    - text: Sifa
      href: https://sifa.id/p/luismmontilla.com
---

![[Falcón, Venezuela. Image by Ialo Hernández](https://unsplash.com/photos/meMvL4RpAKs)](https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1536008897748-4b406bbb15e6?q=80&w=2920&auto=format&fit=crop&ixlib=rb-4.1.0&ixid=M3wxMjA3fDB8MHxwaG90by1wYWdlfHx8fGVufDB8fHx8fA%3D%3D)

# From studying life beneath the waves to creating connections above them
Welcome!

Here you will find links to my publications, social networks, side projects, and occasional blog posts about my journey from studying coastal-marine ecological communities to foster  engagement, connection, and collaboration within social communities. Feel free to contact me in case of any inquiry!hor

![[Algo-r-(h)-i-(y)-thms, 2018](https://studiotomassaraceno.org/algo-rhythms-berlin/). [Image by Alina Grubnyak](https://unsplash.com/photos/group-of-people-sitting-on-floor-R84Oy89aNKs)](https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1545987796-b199d6abb1b4?q=80&w=2070&auto=format&fit=crop&ixlib=rb-4.1.0&ixid=M3wxMjA3fDB8MHxwaG90by1wYWdlfHx8fGVufDB8fHx8fA%3D%3D)
